ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pricing_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing plan (e.g., Freelancer, Startup) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the pricing plan */,
  "projects" TEXT /* Number of projects supported by the plan */,
  "support" TEXT /* Level of support provided by the plan */,
  "user_limit" INTEGER /* Number of users allowed under the plan */,
  "feature_list" TEXT /* List of features included in the plan */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Applicable discount codes */,
  "plan_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the plan (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing plan associated with the license */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the license */,
  "license_key" TEXT /* License key generated for the customer */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the license was purchased */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license (e.g., active, expired, cancelled) */,
  "upgrade_history" TEXT /* History of upgrades and downgrades */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_payment_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("payment_gateway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pricing_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the customer (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment gateway (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, sales, customer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the period */,
  "top_selling_plan" TEXT /* Top selling pricing plan */,
  "customer_behavior" TEXT /* Customer behavior data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
